title: lippia fragrans
intro: Lippia fragrans, also known as the fragrant lippia or Mexican oregano, is a plant species belonging to the Verbenaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lippia fragrans include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Lippia fragrans can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
